sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { FontAwesomeIcon } from '@fortawesome/react-fontawesome'; import { faLeaf, faEye, faHandshake, faRecycle, faBoxOpen, faQuoteLeft } from '@fortawesome/free-solid-svg-icons'; import { aboutHeroImage, heritageImage, sustainImage, founderImage } from '../data/products'; import './AboutPage.css'; export default function AboutPage() { return (
{/* Hero */}
ESTABLISHED IN NATURE

Our Story

Born from the quiet wisdom of age-old herbal traditions, SG Herbals bridges the gap between ancestral plant knowledge and simple, honest handcrafted care. We believe your daily ritual should be as pure as the ingredients themselves.

{/* Heritage */}

From Tradition to Craft

Our journey began with a simple belief — that the herbs growing around us hold everything our skin and hair need. We spent years learning from farmers, grandmothers, and herbal healers to understand the true power of plants.

Today, we craft every product in small batches using time-honoured methods. No shortcuts. No synthetic additives. Just pure, honest ingredients working together the way nature intended.

50+ NATURAL INGREDIENTS
8 Years CRAFTING WITH CARE
{/* Values */}

Our Three Pillars

The principles that guide every ingredient we pick and every product we make.

100% Pure

We use only natural herbal ingredients. No synthetic fillers, no artificial fragrances, and absolutely no compromise on the purity of our products.

Full Transparency

We believe you have the right to know exactly what is in every product you use. No hidden chemicals, no complicated terms — just honest ingredients, clearly listed.

Ethical Sourcing

We work directly with local organic farmers who care for the land. Our fair practices support both the farming communities and the natural ecosystems they tend.

{/* Sustainability */}

Made with Care, by Design

Natural & Eco-Friendly Packaging

Our packaging is designed to be minimal, recyclable, and as kind to the earth as our products are to your skin.

Small-Batch Production

By making in small, controlled batches, we reduce waste and ensure every product you receive is as fresh as possible.

"Sustainability is not a feature at SG Herbals; it is our foundation. We take only what we can replenish."

{/* Founder Quote */}

"I believe that our skin deserves the same respect we give to the earth itself. Every bar of soap, every oil we craft is a small act of care — for you and for nature."

Sreedevi G. Founder & Head Craftsperson
); }
